name: Chocolate Mousse
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-1/2 quart saucepan, mix gelatin, sugar, and salt.
2. Stir in milk and chocolate. Stir over medium heat until gelatin is dissolved and chocolate melted.
3. Remove from heat, and beat with rotary beater until chocolate is blended. Stir in vanilla.
4. Chill in saucepan in bowl of ice water, stirring occasionally, until slightly thickened.
5. Fold in cream. Turn into a 10-cup mold or 12 individual molds.
6. Chill until firm.
7. Unmold.
